tool_args.raw_text: 125th STREET TRANSPORTATION IMPROVEMENTS PROJECT - TECHNICAL MEMORANDUM - Summary of December 3, 2012 Public Workshop 2. January 2, 2013. Prepared for: NYC Department of Transportation. Prepared by: Zetlin Strategic Communications, Inc.

payload.title: 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project: Technical Memorandum - Summary of December 3, 2012 Public Workshop 2
payload.description: Summary of the second public workshop for the 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project, held December 3, 2012, covering the proposed M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street and related transportation improvements.

tool_args.label: 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project
tool_args.raw_text: 125th STREET TRANSPORTATION IMPROVEMENTS PROJECT

payload.description: Project to improve transportation on 125th Street, including the proposed M60 Select Bus Service with off-board fare collection, dedicated off-set bus lanes, and other potential transportation improvements and SBS amenities.

tool_args.label: 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: 125th Street

payload.description: Corridor in Manhattan where the 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project and proposed M60 Select Bus Service are focused. Key intersections mentioned include Lenox Avenue, Lexington Avenue, Park Avenue, Third Avenue, and Second Avenue.

tool_args.label: M60 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: introduce the proposed M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street

payload.route_name: M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street
payload.description: Proposed M60 SBS service on 125th Street with off-board fare collection, dedicated off-set bus lanes, and other SBS amenities. Provides airport connections.

tool_args.label: M35
tool_args.raw_text: M35 should be eliminated and the M100 extended to Randall's Island. M35 has a more detrimental impact on the intersection of Lexington Avenue and 125th Street than the other buses.

payload.description: Bus route discussed at the workshop. Comments suggested eliminating the M35 and extending the M100 to Randall's Island. M35 described as having a detrimental impact on the Lexington Avenue and 125th Street intersection.

tool_args.label: M100
tool_args.raw_text: M35 should be eliminated and the M100 extended to Randall's Island

payload.description: Bus route discussed at the workshop. A suggestion was made to extend M100 to Randall's Island.

tool_args.label: M101
tool_args.raw_text: Make the M101 an SBS route and extend the M102 to City Hall

payload.description: Bus route discussed at the workshop. A suggestion was made to make the M101 an SBS route.

tool_args.label: M102
tool_args.raw_text: Make the M101 an SBS route and extend the M102 to City Hall

payload.description: Bus route discussed at the workshop. A suggestion was made to extend the M102 to City Hall.

tool_args.label: December 3, 2012 Public Workshop 2 - 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project
tool_args.raw_text: The New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) conducted a Public Workshop on December 3, 2012 to hear about the critical issues impacting bus movement on 125th Street and to introduce the proposed M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street.

payload.event_name: 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project Public Workshop 2
payload.description: Second public workshop for the 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project. Presented data collected and analyzed, input from first workshop (Sept 19, 2012), introduced M60 SBS proposal with off-board fare collection and off-set bus lanes, and other potential improvements.
organizers: New York City Department of Transportation
participants: City College / University Transportation Research Center (UTRC)
City Council Member Inez E. Dickens

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.
event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: September 19, 2012 Public Workshop 1 - 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project
tool_args.raw_text: input received at the first Public Workshop that took place on September 19, 2012

payload.event_name: 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project Public Workshop 1
payload.description: First public workshop for the 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project. Input received at this workshop was reviewed at the second workshop on December 3, 2012.
organizers: New York City Department of Transportation

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Off-board fare collection on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: introduced the selection of the M60 to upgrade to SBS Service with off-board fare collection, dedicated off-set bus lanes and other potential transportation improvements

payload.description: Proposed off-board fare collection as part of M60 SBS service on 125th Street. Public education on off-board fare collection requested, with emphasis on consequences of fare evasion.

tool_args.label: Off-set (offset) bus lanes on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: dedicated off-set bus lanes

payload.description: Proposed off-set (offset) bus lanes as part of M60 SBS on 125th Street. Participants were skeptical of effectiveness due to double parking but many could see benefits. Project staff emphasized that all buses would continue to stop at the curb.

tool_args.label: Traffic Signal Priority (TSP) on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Many participants embraced Traffic Signal Priority as a good idea for 125th Street.

payload.description: Traffic Signal Priority proposed for 125th Street. Many participants embraced it as a good idea.

tool_args.label: All-door boarding on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: All door boarding was seen as a positive amenity to reduce the time it takes to load a bus.

payload.description: All-door boarding seen as a positive amenity to reduce bus boarding time on 125th Street.

tool_args.label: Limited stops on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: There was a lot of interest around the topic of limited stops. Many participants saw the benefits of limited stops and felt they should be geared towards subway connections.

payload.description: Limited stop service discussed as part of M60 SBS proposal on 125th Street. Participants saw benefits and felt stops should be geared towards subway connections. Acknowledged some could be upset losing their current stop.

tool_args.label: Extended bus stops on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Increasing the length of bus stops will help with bus bunching. Concern was expressed that the extended bus stops would displace vendors.

payload.description: Extended/longer bus stops proposed for 125th Street. Expressed as helping with bus bunching, but concern raised about displacement of vendors.

tool_args.label: Double-parking is a major issue on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: The focus of the parking discussion was double-parking. Double-parking is an issue along the corridor that brings a mixed reaction from participants. Some felt that there is too much double parking and it is the cause of many of the problems on the corridor.

payload.claim_text: Double-parking is an issue along the corridor. Some felt that there is too much double parking and it is the cause of many of the problems on the corridor.
payload.subject: 125th Street corridor

tool_args.label: Lexington Avenue and 125th Street intersection problems
tool_args.raw_text: The Lexington Avenue and 125th Street intersection is the generator of many of the corridor's problems. Some of the elderly try to avoid that intersection. Ban all turns at Lexington Avenue and 125th Street during peak periods to relieve congestion and improve pedestrian safety.

payload.claim_text: The Lexington Avenue and 125th Street intersection is the generator of many of the corridor's problems.

tool_args.label: Bus bunching causes delays on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Bus bunching causes a lot of transit delays; this is especially bad in the winter as people waiting for the bus often have to deal with puddles and other weather related issues to access buses.

payload.claim_text: Bus bunching causes a lot of transit delays; this is especially bad in the winter as people waiting for the bus often have to deal with puddles and other weather related issues to access buses.
payload.subject: 125th Street bus service

tool_args.label: M60 SBS is about airport connections, not 125th Street bus service
tool_args.raw_text: A representative of Senator Perkins asserted in a prepared statement at the outset of the workshop that the project is about airport connections for the M60, not about 125th Street bus service.

payload.claim_text: The project is about airport connections for the M60, not about 125th Street bus service.
payload.subject: 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project / M60 SBS

tool_args.label: Pedestrian safety concerns on 125th Street from Park Avenue to Third Avenue
tool_args.raw_text: Major pedestrian safety concerns exist on 125th St from Park Avenue to Third Avenue.

payload.claim_text: Major pedestrian safety concerns exist on 125th St from Park Avenue to Third Avenue.
payload.location: 125th Street from Park Avenue to Third Avenue, Manhattan

location_normalized.raw_text: 125th Street from Park Avenue to Third Avenue, Manhattan

tool_args.label: Taxis and car services block bus stops on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Taxis and car services pick up and drop off passengers in bus stops blocking buses from accessing the curb.

payload.claim_text: Taxis and car services pick up and drop off passengers in bus stops blocking buses from accessing the curb.

tool_args.label: People walk faster than buses from Second to Lexington on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Many people get off westbound buses to walk from Second Avenue to Lexington Avenue since they can walk faster than the bus travels.

payload.claim_text: Many people get off westbound buses to walk from Second Avenue to Lexington Avenue since they can walk faster than the bus travels.
payload.location: 125th Street between Second Avenue and Lexington Avenue, Manhattan

location_normalized.raw_text: 125th Street between Second Avenue and Lexington Avenue, Manhattan

tool_args.label: Economic resurgence of 125th Street has increased congestion
tool_args.raw_text: The economic resurgence of 125th Street has led to increased congestion.

payload.claim_text: The economic resurgence of 125th Street has led to increased congestion.

tool_args.label: M35 has most detrimental impact on Lexington and 125th intersection
tool_args.raw_text: M35 has a more detrimental impact on the intersection of Lexington Avenue and 125th Street than the other buses.

payload.claim_text: M35 has a more detrimental impact on the intersection of Lexington Avenue and 125th Street than the other buses.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Countdown clocks on pedestrian signals increased safety
tool_args.raw_text: Countdown clocks on pedestrian signals have increased pedestrian safety.

payload.claim_text: Countdown clocks on pedestrian signals have increased pedestrian safety.

tool_args.label: Banning left turns from 125th at Lenox Avenue has helped
tool_args.raw_text: Banning left turns from 125th Street at Lenox Avenue has helped traffic move more efficiently.

payload.claim_text: Banning left turns from 125th Street at Lenox Avenue has helped traffic move more efficiently.
